name: analyze_market
description: Perform one-time analysis on a Polymarket market. Fetches market data and provides analysis for trading edges.

market_url_or_id.description: Market URL, slug, or numeric ID (e.g., 'trump-wins-2024' or '1234567')

name: monitor_market
description: Monitor a Polymarket market for alerts including price changes, large trades, and arbitrage opportunities.

market_url_or_id.description: Market URL, slug, or numeric ID

name: fetch_user_profile
description: Fetch Polymarket user profile with positions, trades, and P&L. Provide a wallet address to get their trading activity.

name: detect_arbitrage
description: Scan Polymarket markets for pair cost arbitrage opportunities. Finds markets where YES + NO < $1.00.

name: track_whales
description: Track whale activity on Polymarket. Identifies large trades and smart money movements.

market_url_or_id.description: Market URL, slug, or numeric ID (optional)

name: analyze_sentiment
description: Analyze sentiment for Polymarket markets. Provides directional sentiment based on price levels.

market_url_or_id.description: Market URL, slug, or numeric ID

limit.description: Number of markets to analyze if no specific market
